title: Kell Plath Corporation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kell Plath Corporation''' was a conglomerate that held many businesses and housing establishments in the city of [[Sodonna]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. The company also owned the [[Koqus liner]] ''[[Star Morning]]'' which was a huge help during the migration of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] to the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
